content_fingerprint: openai launches gpt 5 5 its most capable model to date openai has released gpt 5 5 positioning it as the company s smartest model yet optimized for complex multi step tasks across coding research and data analysis workflows openai on thursday announced the general availability of gpt 5 5 described as its most advanced model to date the release targets what the company calls complex real world tasks including coding research and multi tool data analysis representing a shift toward models purpose built for agentic multi step workflows rather than single turn prompts the announcement published on
